rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Educ. Code §33.054 governs retention and use of child photographs by participating schools. The two provisions address unrelated subjects with no overlapping operative effect.
quote: Photographs retained under this section may be used only for the identification and location of a missing child.
_note: No conflict; rule_text pertains to school photographs, unrelated to homestead exemption.
